fields.label: What is your last name?
fields.helpText: Your family name or surname.

fields.label: What is your first name?
fields.helpText: Your given name — the name you go by.

fields.label: What is your middle initial?
fields.helpText: Just the first letter of your middle name. Leave blank if you don't have one.

fields.label: Have you ever used a different last name?
fields.helpText: Maiden name, previous married name, or any other last name you've used. Leave blank if not applicable.

fields.label: What is your street address?
fields.helpText: Your current home address — street name and number.

fields.label: Apartment or unit number?
fields.helpText: If you live in an apartment, condo, or unit, enter the number here. Otherwise leave blank.

fields.label: What city do you live in?
What state?
fields.helpText: Use the two-letter abbreviation (e.g., CA, TX, NY).

fields.label: What is your date of birth?
fields.helpText: Enter as MM/DD/YYYY.

fields.label: What is your Social Security Number?
fields.helpText: Your SSN is voluntary unless your employer uses E-Verify. It stays private and is only used to verify your work eligibility.

fields.label: What is your email address?
fields.helpText: A personal email where you can be reached.

fields.label: What is your phone number?
fields.helpText: A phone number where you can be reached.

fields.label: What is your citizenship or immigration status?
fields.helpText: Choose the option that best describes your current status. This determines which documents you'll need to show your employer.

options.label: I am a citizen of the United States
I am a noncitizen national of the United States
I am a lawful permanent resident (Green Card holder)
I am authorized to work in the US (with a visa or work permit)

fields.label: What is your USCIS Number or A-Number?
fields.helpText: Your Alien Registration Number (A-Number) or USCIS Number. You can find this on your Green Card (Form I-551). It starts with the letter A followed by 7-9 digits.

fields.label: When does your work authorization expire?
fields.helpText: The date your current work permit or visa authorization expires. Enter as MM/DD/YYYY. If your authorization does not expire, write N/A.

fields.label: Which document number can you provide?
fields.helpText: You need to provide at least one of these. Pick whichever you have available.

fields.label: What is your Alien Registration Number (A-Number)?
fields.helpText: Starts with the letter A followed by 7-9 digits. Found on your Employment Authorization Document (EAD) or other USCIS documents.

fields.label: What is your I-94 Admission Number?
fields.helpText: Your 11-digit I-94 number. You can look it up at i94.cbp.dhs.gov if you don't have it handy.

fields.label: What is your foreign passport number?
fields.helpText: The passport number from your country of origin.

fields.label: What country issued your passport?
fields.helpText: The country that issued the foreign passport you entered above.

fields.label: Did someone help you fill out this form?
fields.helpText: If a preparer or translator helped you complete Section 1, select Yes. If you filled it out on your own, select No.

options.label: No, I filled this out myself
Yes, a preparer or translator helped me

fields.label: Preparer's address?
fields.helpText: Full address of the person who helped you: street, city, state, and ZIP.

fields.label: Preparer's signature
fields.helpText: The person who helped you needs to sign here.

fields.label: Your signature
fields.helpText: By signing, you confirm that everything you entered is true and correct to the best of your knowledge. You understand that providing false information may result in penalties.

fields.label: Today's date
fields.helpText: The date you are signing this form.
